name: aurora-assistant
description: AURORA – a secure, accessible, voice-first AI assistant

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-core && npm run build --workspace=packages/governance-agent && npm run build --workspace=packages/knowledge-agent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/governance-agent && npm run test --workspace=packages/knowledge-agent && npm run test --workspace=packages/backend && npm run test --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared-core && npm run lint --workspace=packages/governance-agent && npm run lint --workspace=packages/knowledge-agent && npm run lint --workspace=packages/backend && npm run lint --workspace=packages/frontend
